--- Main Page ---
Springwater Supper Club & Lounge
0
Springwater Supper Club & Lounge is the oldest continuously open and operational bar in the great state of Tennessee. Happily hosting Live Music 5 nights a week, plenty of afternoon events, and the COLDEST beer in town! With the storied history and status comes all sorts of fantastic shows both big and up-and-coming, a plethora of big name music video shoots, loyal and neighborly regulars and plenty of tourists stopping in to grab a taste of Nashville history.
Springwater is 21+ and is a Cash Only bar.
COVID PROTOCOLS
Currently, we do not require everyone who comes into the establishment to have their vaccination card or a negative Covid test except for shows where the bands require it.  It will say so on the event.
Thank you
